mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO stock_basic (ts_code, symbol, name, area, industry, fullname, enname, cnspell, market, exchange, curr_type, list_status, list_date, delist_date, is_hs, act_name, act_ent_type) VALUES
(#{item.tsCode}, #{item.symbol}, #{item.name}, #{item.area}, #{item.industry}, #{item.fullname}, #{item.enname}, #{item.cnspell}, #{item.market}, #{item.exchange}, #{item.currType}, #{item.listStatus}, #{item.listDate}, #{item.delistDate}, #{item.isHs}, #{item.actName}, #{item.actEntType})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM stock_basic WHERE ts_code IN
#{item.tsCode}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ts_code) FROM daily_quote WHERE trade_date >= #{startDate}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stock_basic WHERE list_status IS NULL OR market IS NULL OR exchange IS NULL
